echo.message: buildJbigi-arm64 Build Linux ARM64 jbigi .so files ➜ installer/lib/jbigi/
buildJbigi Build all jbigi native libraries (Win64 + Linux64 + ARM64) ➜ installer/lib/jbigi/
buildJbigi-linux64 Build Linux 64-bit jbigi .so files ➜ installer/lib/jbigi/
buildJbigi-win64 Build Windows 64-bit jbigi DLLs using MinGW ➜ installer/lib/jbigi/
buildJetty Build all Jetty related jar components ➜ ./build/
buildProperties Display build properties and Ant / JDK versions for current build
buildRequirements Information about requirements for building packages using ant
buildRouterConsole Build required .jar components for RouterConsole ➜ ./build/
buildSusiMailJar Build SusiMail .jar component for testing ➜ ./build/susimail.jar
buildWEB Build required .jar & .war components for RouterConsole ➜ ./build/
installer / installer5 Build GUI installer (IzPack4 / IzPack5) ➜ ./dist/i2pinstall.exe
installer-linux / installer5-linux Build Linux GUI installer (IzPack4 / Izpack5) ➜ ./dist/i2pinstall…linux-only.jar
installer-nowindows / installer5-nowindows Build GUI installer without Windows support (IzPack4 / IzPack5) ➜ ./dist/i2pinstall….jar
installer-osx Build OS X GUI installer ➜ ./dist/i2pinstall…osx.tar.bz2
installer-windows / installer5-windows Build Windows GUI installer (IzPack4 / IzPack5) ➜ ./dist/i2pinstall…windows.exe
7zip-multiplatform Installation 7zips for FreeBSD, macOS, Linux and Windows ➜ ./dist/
zip-freebsd Installation zip for FreeBSD without installer ➜ ./dist/i2p-freebsd.zip
zip-linux Installation zip for Linux without installer ➜ ./dist/i2p-linux.zip
zip-macos Installation zip for macOS without installer ➜ ./dist/i2p-macos.zip
zip-windows Installation zip for Windows without installer ➜ ./dist/i2p-windows.zip
updater Build updater for existing installs ➜ ./dist/i2pupdate.zip
updaterWithJavadocAndJetty Updater + javadocs (linked in console) + Jetty
updaterWithJettyFixesAndGeoIP Updater + local Jetty patches + GeoIP database
updaterWithJettyFixesAndJbigi Updater + local Jetty patches + jBigi library
updaterCompact Updater w/o SAM, DesktopGUI, systray, country/continent lists, docs/proxy, docs/readme
updaterCompactRouterConsoleNoThemes Updater with RouterConsole only (no themes)
updaterCompactRouterConsole Updater with RouterConsole and console/webapp themes only
updaterCompactWithDocs Compact updater with readme and proxy docs
updaterCompactWithGeoIPAndJbigi Compact updater with GeoIP database and Jbigi
updaterCompactWithGeoIP Compact updater with GeoIP database
updater200 Updater (pack200 - requires Java < v14 or pre-existing lib/pack200.jar) ➜ ./dist/i2pupdate200.zip
updater200Compact Updater (pack200) w/o SAM, DesktopGUI, systray, country/continent lists, docs/proxy, docs/readme
updater200CompactWithDocs Compact updater (pack200) with readme and proxy docs
updater200CompactWithGeoIP Compact updater (pack200) with GeoIP database
updater200WithJavadocAndJetty Updater (pack200) + javadocs (with console link) + Jetty
updater200WithJettyAndGeoIPAndLicenses Updater (pack200) + Jetty + GeoIP database + licenses
updater200WithJettyFixesAndGeoIP Updater (pack200) + local Jetty patches + GeoIP database
updaterRouter Updater with i2p.jar and router.jar only
i2psnark_nozip Build standalone I2PSnark install, no zip file ➜ ./dist/i2psnark-standalone
buildProperties Display build properties and Ant / JDK versions for current build
buildRequirements Information about requirements for building packages using ant
distclean Clean up all derived and temporary files in workspace
distcleanWebapps Clean up all webapp-related derived and temporary files in workspace
getGitRev Check current Git revision in workspace and print truncated revision hash
getGitRevLong Check current Git revision in workspace and print full revision hash
poupdate-source Update the .po files for translators (requires jsp files to be compiled first)
updateWrapper Download deltapack, update Unix binaries, build win64 binaries
bumpBuildTime Update core/java/src/net/i2p/time/BuildTime.java with today's date
createThemesZip Create zip with all console and webapp themes and resources ➜ ./dist/themes.zip
debian Generate Debian packages in ../ then run 'debian-clean'
debian-clean Rollback Debian specific patches then run 'distclean'
debianhowto Instructions on building Debian packages
pkg Run 'distclean' then package everything up (updater, installer)
pkg-portable-win32 Build a minimal, portable install for Win32 ➜ ./portable-win32.zip
tarball Create tar archive for clean install ➜ ./dist/i2p.tar.bz2
javadoc-nostylesheet Create javadocs for project without custom stylesheet ➜ ./dist/javadoc
javadoc-test Javadocs for unit test classes ➜ ./build/javadoc-test
javadoc-zip Create javadocs zip for project ➜ ./dist/javadoc.zip
javadoc-zip-nostylesheet Create javadocs zip without custom stylesheet for project ➜ ./dist/javadoc.zip
jsdoc Create jsdoc with docdash template (requires npm) ➜ ./dist/jsdoc
jsdoc-minami Create jsdoc with minami template (requires npm) ➜ ./dist/jsdoc
jsdoc-minami-zip Create jsdoc zip with minami template ➜ ./dist/jsdoc-minami.zip
jsdoc-tui Create jsdoc with tui-jsdoc-template (requires npm) ➜ ./dist/jsdoc
jsdoc-tui-zip Create jsdoc zip with tui-jsdoc-template ➜ ./dist/jsdoc-tui.zip
jsdoc-zip Create jsdoc zip with docdash template ➜ ./dist/jsdoc.zip
checkstyle-local Checkstyle report with clickable file links ➜ dist/checkstyle-local.html
checkstyle-fix-errors Run fix-java-issues.py --fix checkstyle indent imports (dry run)
checkstyle-fix-errors-apply Apply fix-java-issues.py --fix checkstyle indent imports
codeql Run CodeQL security analysis ➜ dist/codeql-java.html
pmd Run PMD Java and JavaScript static analysis ➜ dist/pmd-java.html + dist/pmd-js.html
pmd-java Run PMD static analysis on Java sources ➜ dist/pmd-java.html + dist/pmd-java-local.html
pmd-js Run PMD static analysis on JavaScript sources ➜ dist/pmd-js.html + dist/pmd-js-local.html
pmd-fix-errors Run fix-java-issues.py (dry run) ➜ all fix types
pmd-fix-errors-apply Apply fix-java-issues.py --fix all fix types
spotbugs Run SpotBugs static analysis on Java sources ➜ dist/spotbugs.html + dist/spotbugs-local.html
report-all-java Run all Java analysis tools and combine into single report ➜ dist/report-all-java.html + dist/report-all-java-local.html
report-all-java-quick Compile combined report from existing results (no re-analysis) ➜ dist/report-all-java.html + dist/report-all-java-local.html
test Run JUnit tests (Core, MiniStreaming, Streaming) via tools/scripts/run-tests.sh
testJbigi Benchmark jbigi: native vs pure Java modPow/modPowCT/modInverse
testscripts Run various scripts to check certificate validity, file integrity etc
To build debian packages, ensure that you have the necessary build-dependencies installed,
indicated in the file 'distro/debian/control' in the 'Build-Depends' field.
The following command will install the build dependencies:
sudo apt install debhelper ant debconf default-jdk gettext libgmp-dev po-debconf fakeroot \
build-essential quilt dh-apparmor libservice-wrapper-java libjson-simple-java devscripts \
Additionally, for runtime dependencies (console flags and geoip database):
Once the dependencies are installed, run 'ant debian' to patch the source and build packages.
To build using ant, there are a few basic requirements:
* Ensure your locale is set to UTF-8
* A Java JDK installation - Oracle, OpenJDK or Microsoft work well
* If you're building updates to be shared, building with Java 8 is recommended, though not required
* The ant-contrib package is a required dependency which supports various ant extensions
* For translation support, GNU gettext is required, and can be installed from repos in most Linux distros
* To enable Javascript compression of the console and webapp scripts, the uglifyjs package is required
* To enable HTML compression of javadocs, the minify package is required
* To build pack200 updates, Java 13 or earlier is required; on Linux, the GNU parallel package is also required
* On a Linux system with multiple Java installations, you can configure ant to use a specific version by setting
an alias in your ~/.bashrc file, e.g. alias ant8="JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-1.8.0-openjdk-amd64 ant"

input.message: Enter sud/su2 private signing key file:

fail.message: You must enter an existing file path.

input.message: Enter su3 private signing key store:

fail.message: You must enter an existing file path.
You must enter a name.
You must enter a password.

target.name: builddep
target.depends: builddepSmall, buildSAM, buildSusiMail, buildSusiDNS, buildI2PSnark, buildI2PControl

target.name: builddepSmall
target.depends: buildrouter, buildSystray, buildDesktopGui, buildRouterConsole, buildStreaming, buildI2PTunnel, buildAddressbook, buildPack200

target.name: buildRouterConsole
target.depends: buildrouter, buildSystray, buildDesktopGui, buildJetty, buildJrobin, buildI2PTunnel

target.name: buildProperties
target.depends: getGitRev, getReleaseNumber, getBuildNumber, setBuildTimestamp, disableManifestClasspath, checkLibraryVersions

attribute.name: Class-Path
attribute.value: lib/commons-el.jar lib/desktopgui.jar lib/i2p.jar lib/i2psnark.jar lib/i2ptunnel.jar lib/jasper-runtime.jar lib/javax.servlet.jar lib/jbigi.jar lib/jetty-continuation.jar lib/jetty-deploy.jar lib/jetty-http.jar lib/jetty-i2p.jar lib/jetty-io.jar lib/jetty-rewrite-handler.jar lib/jetty-security.jar lib/jetty-servlet.jar lib/jetty-servlets.jar lib/jetty-start.jar lib/jetty-util.jar lib/jetty-webapp.jar lib/jetty-xml.jar lib/jrobin.jar lib/jstl.jar lib/mstreaming.jar lib/org.mortbay.jetty.jar lib/pack200.jar lib/routerconsole.jar lib/router.jar lib/sam.jar lib/standard.jar lib/streaming.jar lib/systray.jar lib/wrapper.jar

target.name: buildJbigi-win64
target.description: Build Windows 64-bit jbigi DLLs using MinGW, copy to installer/lib/jbigi/

target.name: buildJbigi-linux64
target.description: Build Linux 64-bit jbigi .so files, copy to installer/lib/jbigi/

target.name: buildJbigi-arm64
target.description: Build Linux ARM64 jbigi .so files, copy to installer/lib/jbigi/

target.name: buildJbigi
target.description: Build all jbigi native libraries (Win64 + Linux64 + ARM64), copy to installer/lib/jbigi/

target.name: testJbigi
target.description: Benchmark jbigi: modPow/modPowCT/modInverse (native vs pure Java)

target.name: poupdate
target.depends: buildRouter, buildStreaming, buildSystray, buildJetty, buildDesktopGui, buildJrobin, buildAddressbook

echo.message: Setting environment variable LG2 to a language code (e.g. de)
will restrict language update to the language you specified, leaving other languages unchanged.
javadoc creation complete, saved to dist/javadoc (${ant.project.name} ${release.number}-${i2p.build.number}${build.extra})
javadoc creation complete -> Saved to dist/javadoc (${ant.project.name} ${release.number}-${i2p.build.number}${build.extra})

javadoc.doctitle: I2P Unit Test Javadocs for Release ${release.number} Build ${i2p.build.number}${build.extra}
javadoc.windowtitle: I2P Anonymous Network - Java Documentation - Version ${release.number}

echo.message: Warning, javadoc embeds timestamps in the output, run with 'TZ=UTC ant javadoc' if you plan to distribute

target.description: Create jsdoc with docdash template (requires npm)

target.name: updater200WithJettyFixesAndGeoIP
target.depends: timestamp.started, prepjupdatefixes, prepgeoupdate, repack200, zipit, timestamp.stopped

target.name: updater200WithJettyFixesAndJbigi
target.depends: timestamp.started, prepjupdatefixes, prepjbigiupdate, pack200, zipit200, timestamp.stopped

target.name: updater200WithLicences
target.depends: timestamp.started, prepupdate, preplicenses, pack200, zipit200, timestamp.stopped

arg.value: find pkg-temp/lib/*.jar pkg-temp/webapps/*war -type f | parallel 'echo Pack200 compression for: {} && mv {} {}.jar && pack200 --effort=6 --modification-time=latest --segment-limit=-1 -g {}.pack {}.jar && rm -f {}.jar'

for %i in (pkg-temp\webapps\*.war) do (move %i %i.jar && pack200 -g pkg-temp\webapps\%~ni.war.pack %i.jar && del %i.jar) & for %i in (pkg-temp\lib\*.jar) do (pack200 --effort=6 --modification-time=latest --segment-limit=-1 -g %i.pack %i && del %i)
for i in pkg-temp/lib/*.jar pkg-temp/webapps/*war; do echo 'Repacking' $i; mv $i $i.jar && pack200 -r $i.jar && mv $i.jar $i & done; wait
for i in pkg-temp/lib/*.jar pkg-temp/webapps/*war; do echo 'Repacking' $i; mv $i $i.jar && pack200 -r $i.jar && mv $i.jar $i & done; wait

target.name: prepupdate
target.depends: build2, prepupdateSmall, preplicenses, prepConsoleDocUpdates, prepCertificates, prep-script-translation, truncatehistory

target.name: truncatehistory
target.concat:
----------------
EARLIER HISTORY IS AVAILABLE IN THE SOURCE PACKAGE

target.depends: verifyReleaseBuildNumbers, -pre-release, debcheckpatch, distclean, testscripts, updaterWithJetty, delete-j6-update, installer5-nowindows, delete-nonwindows, installer5-windows, -releaseit

echo.message: Don't forget to sign i2pinstall_${release.number}_windows.exe on Windows and then:

fail.message: javac.version is set to ${javac.version} - must be 1.7 for Android

echo.message: This requires the Maven Ant Tasks to be installed.
If this fails, on Debian jessie or, Ubuntu Trusty / Xenial:
Sorry, not available on more recent distributions

artifact:pom.name: I2P Ministreaming
artifact:pom.description: API, interfaces, and factory for a TCP-like set of sockets for communicating over I2P.

artifact:pom.name: I2P Streaming
artifact:pom.description: Implementation of a TCP-like set of sockets for communicating over I2P.

artifact:pom.name: I2P Servlet classes
artifact:pom.description: Various servlet classes provided to plugins by Java I2P.

target.name: copyFromBuildRoot
target.description: Copy artifacts from build.root subdirs to root build/
